sub_modules.nr_poly_eval_fixed: Combinational fixed-point cubic polynomial evaluator using Horner form.
sub_modules.nr_poly_deriv_fixed: Combinational fixed-point derivative evaluator for the cubic polynomial.
sub_modules.nr_fixed_div: Combinational signed fixed-point divider used to compute p(x)/p'(x).
sub_modules.nr_update_step: Combinational Newton-Raphson update stage with zero-derivative hold behavior.
sub_modules.nr_saturate_fixed: Combinational saturation stage that maps the wide internal root to the output width.
sub_modules.nr_root_verify: Combinational residual verification block that checks |p(root)| against EPSILON.
